commands.review_summary:
The PR preserves partially valid legacy doctor migrations, threads a skip-plugin-validation config write path through doctor/config persistence, adds regression coverage and a changelog entry, and fixes one `.sort()` lint violation in plugin install code.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows `migrateLegacyConfig` returns null after unrelated plugin-aware validation fails, and `applyLegacyCompatibilityStep` then leaves the unmigrated candidate in place.
commands.review_followup: The contributor PR already contains the narrow fix; the remaining action is maintainer handling for rebase/mergeability and exact-head validation, not a separate repair PR.

target.title: fix(doctor): commit legacy migrations even when unrelated validation fails
